technologies = {
    sample_tech_a = {
        folder = {
            name = infantry
            position = { x = 0 y = 0 }
        }
        path = { leads_to_tech = sample_tech_b }
    }

    sample_tech_b = {
        folder = {
            name = infantry
            position = { x = 1 y = 1 }
        }
    }
}
